news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Funds
First Trust ETF Introduces Its First Bitcoin Strategy ETFs

overview.description: The FT Vest Bitcoin Strategy & Target Income ETF (DFII) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks to provide capped gains on the returns of bitcoin and a high level of income through options contracts that reference bitcoin ETPs or indices, and other income-producing investments. DFII was launched on Apr 2, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. ("FTA") announces the declaration of the monthly distributions for certain exchange-traded funds advised by FTA. The following dates apply to ...

data.title: First Trust ETF Introduces Its First Bitcoin Strategy ETFs
